_description: Shared CloudFormation parameters for FSx for ONTAP Management Console stacks. All 5 stacks reference a subset of these parameters.

VpcId.description: Target VPC where all management console resources will be deployed.

PrivateSubnetIds.description: Private subnets for ECS Fargate tasks and Lambda. Must span at least 2 Availability Zones.

constraints.note: Subnets must be in different AZs for high availability

PublicSubnetIds.description: Public subnets for ALB and NAT Gateway. Must span at least 2 Availability Zones.

constraints.note: Subnets must be in different AZs for ALB requirement

OntapManagementEndpoint.description: FSx for ONTAP management endpoint IP address or DNS name. Used by Harvest and ToolJet for REST API access on port 443.

OntapCredentialsSecretArn.description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing ONTAP admin credentials (username/password JSON).

constraints.note: Secret must contain JSON with 'username' and 'password' keys

CognitoUserPoolId.description: Cognito User Pool ID for unified authentication. Created by the auth stack (Stack 2).

CognitoAppClientId.description: Cognito App Client ID configured for ALB integration with authorization code grant.

CognitoDomain.description: Cognito hosted UI domain prefix (e.g., 'fsxn-mgmt'). Full URL: https://<prefix>.auth.<region>.amazoncognito.com

HarvestImageTag.description: Container image tag for NetApp Harvest collector. Used for version pinning and updates.

constraints.note: Recommend pinning to a specific version (e.g., '24.05.2') for production stability

ToolJetImageTag.description: Container image tag for ToolJet management UI. Used for version pinning and updates.

constraints.note: Recommend pinning to an LTS version for production stability

S3AccessPointArn.description: ARN of the FSx for ONTAP S3 Access Point for file browsing. Used by S3 Copy Lambda for file download operations.

constraints.note: FSx for ONTAP S3 APs do not support presigned URLs — copy-to-bucket pattern required

MfaConfiguration.description: Multi-factor authentication mode for Cognito User Pool.

SessionDurationHours.description: Session duration in hours for authenticated users. Applies to ALB Cognito session cookie.

AlertSnsTopicArn.description: ARN of the SNS topic for CloudWatch alarm notifications. If empty, a new topic is created by the monitoring stack.

constraints.note: Leave empty to create a new SNS topic in the monitoring stack

FsxnSecurityGroupId.description: Security Group ID of the FSx for ONTAP file system. Required for deploy.sh to auto-add access rules for Harvest/ToolJet task SGs.

constraints.note: Set as FSXN_SECURITY_GROUP_ID env var. If not set, you must manually add SG rules.
